title: Open Agentic CMO Strategy Artifact
description: Canonical schema for Porky's structured strategy artifact.

type.description: Artifact type. Must always be strategy.

date_range.description: Date range covered by the strategy.

expected_items.description: Expected number of content items to be generated by Hamm.

messaging_pillars.description: Strategic messaging pillars derived from the audit artifact.

reasoning.description: Why this pillar matters based on the audit artifact.

content_angles.description: Content angles mapped back to Babe's audit insights.

angle.description: Content angle Hamm may use during generation.

source_from_audit.description: Audit insight, signal, or recommendation that supports this angle.

goal.description: Strategic goal served by this angle.

recommended_format.description: Recommended format for this content item.

angle.description: Selected content angle for this date.

objective.description: Content objective for this scheduled item.

content_rules.description: Operational rules for Hamm content generation.

excluded_claims.description: Claims that Hamm must not use. Required by runtime validation when Babe's audit contains publishing risks, unsupported claims, or critical_flags that affect publishing.

safe_framing.description: Safe alternative framing Hamm should use when writing around uncertain, sensitive, or risky topics. Required by runtime validation when Babe's audit contains publishing risks or unsafe claims.

claim.description: Claim that must not be used in downstream content.

examples: Guarantee language is unsupported and unsafe.

framing.description: Safe framing that Hamm may use in content.
examples: Piggy Wallet is designed to help families build better savings habits.

reason.description: Why this framing is safe and appropriate.
examples: This keeps the claim educational and mission-aligned without implying guaranteed financial outcomes.

messaging_pillars.pillar: Financial education starts before kids earn money
messaging_pillars.reasoning: Babe’s audit suggests that parents need simple ways to teach financial habits early.

messaging_pillars.pillar: Saving is a habit, protection is a system
messaging_pillars.reasoning: The audit identifies inflation as a practical family problem. Piggy Wallet should connect healthy saving behavior with protection against value erosion, without implying guaranteed protection or risk-free outcomes.

messaging_pillars.pillar: Simple user experience over financial complexity
messaging_pillars.reasoning: Piggy Wallet uses modern financial infrastructure, but the audience should not need to understand technical concepts to trust the product.

content_angles.angle: Why kids need money habits before they need money
content_angles.source_from_audit: Recommended content angle around early money education.

content_angles.angle: Why a traditional piggy bank is no longer enough
content_angles.source_from_audit: Audit identified inflation pressure as a key family concern.
content_angles.goal: Explain the need for modern savings habits and protection systems without making guaranteed protection claims.

content_angles.angle: Safer financial defaults for busy parents
content_angles.source_from_audit: Audit identified simplicity and trust as key positioning needs.
content_angles.goal: Position Piggy Wallet as helpful and understandable rather than complex or speculative.

weekly_structure.angle: Why a traditional piggy bank is no longer enough
Why kids need money habits before they need money
weekly_structure.objective: Create a simple, shareable educational point.

weekly_structure.angle: Safer financial defaults for busy parents
weekly_structure.objective: Build trust with adults and position Piggy Wallet as a family finance solution.

brand_constraints.constraint: Speak to adults and parents, not directly to children as buyers.
Avoid hype, fear, speculation, or get-rich messaging.
Avoid crypto jargon unless explicitly necessary.
Emphasize simplicity, education, trust, and family outcomes.
Do not invent product capabilities that are not verified.
Do not make guarantees about inflation protection, returns, safety, or risk elimination.

content_rules.rule: Generate exactly 1 item per scheduled date.
Include 1 X thread, 1 X post, and 1 LinkedIn post.
The X thread must include 4–7 tweets.
Every content item must include title, platform, language, content_type, scheduled_date, vertical, version, week, and tags_and_mentions.
Threads must include thread_id and tweets.
Use version v1 unless otherwise specified.
Do not duplicate titles or angles.
Use safe framing when discussing inflation protection, blockchain infrastructure, or product capabilities.
Do not invent product features, integrations, partnerships, performance metrics, or technical architecture.

excluded_claims.reason: Babe’s audit did not verify a guaranteed protection mechanism, and guarantee language creates financial-risk exposure.
Risk-free financial claims are unsupported and unsafe.

excluded_claims.claim: Families need to understand crypto to use Piggy Wallet.
excluded_claims.reason: Babe’s audit indicates the opposite: Piggy Wallet should abstract technical complexity.

excluded_claims.claim: Piggy Wallet is powered by a specific chain.
excluded_claims.reason: Chain-specific positioning was not confirmed in the audit and should not be used unless separately validated.

safe_framing.framing: Piggy Wallet is designed to help families build better savings habits.
safe_framing.reason: This keeps the claim educational and mission-aligned without implying guaranteed outcomes.

safe_framing.framing: Piggy Wallet focuses on financial education and savings protection.
safe_framing.reason: This connects the product mission to the audience need without overpromising.

safe_framing.framing: Piggy Wallet uses modern infrastructure under the hood while keeping the experience simple.
safe_framing.reason: This explains the technology posture without requiring users to understand crypto.

safe_framing.framing: In inflationary environments, families need tools and habits that help them think more intentionally about saving.
safe_framing.reason: This discusses inflation pressure without making financial guarantees.

messaging_pillars.reasoning: Babe’s audit found that parents need simple educational language around money habits.

content_angles.angle: Money habits before the first paycheck
content_angles.source_from_audit: Babe recommended early financial education as a trust-building angle.

weekly_structure.angle: Money habits before the first paycheck
Money habits before the first paycheck
weekly_structure.objective: Reinforce the educational message with a second simple angle.

weekly_structure.angle: Money habits before the first paycheck
weekly_structure.objective: Explain the parent-facing value of early financial education.
